context: Tests whether the response correctly identifies common Python memory leak patterns in a pandas/web service context.

checklist.name: Identifies DataFrame retention as likely cause
checklist.description: Points out that DataFrames may be held in memory via references (global variables, caches, closures, or uncleared lists)

checklist.name: Recommends diagnostic tools
checklist.description: Suggests tracemalloc, objgraph, memory_profiler, or similar tools to diagnose the leak

checklist.name: Mentions garbage collection considerations
checklist.description: Discusses gc module, reference cycles, or del to explicitly free DataFrames

checklist.name: Suggests chunked processing
checklist.description: Recommends processing large CSVs in chunks (pd.read_csv chunksize) instead of loading all at once

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about Python memory management or pandas
